metadata.description: Cross-platform offline-first mobile/desktop app for construction inspectors
metadata.session_notes: Session 490: Testing system overhaul brainstormed + implemented. 30 flows, 12 journeys, 4 tiers, flag-based CLI. Patrol deprecated. Dual code review passed. Phases 3+5 deferred (device required).

active_blockers.title: SQLite missing UNIQUE constraint on project_number — sync race condition
active_blockers.notes: Supabase has UNIQUE(company_id, project_number) but SQLite doesn't. Duplicate project numbers created locally succeed then fail on sync. TOCTOU race in ProjectRepository.create().
active_blockers.impact: Users see 'already exists' errors or duplicate projects. Sync failures.

active_blockers.title: Cross-fixture validation pending for hardened scorecard thresholds
active_blockers.notes: Scorecard hardening implementation is complete and extraction tests are green, but the tightened thresholds and new rows still need broader non-Springfield validation to confirm stable generic gates.
active_blockers.impact: Prevents final closure of scorecard-hardening quality phase.

active_blockers.title: Fixture generation skips without SPRINGFIELD_PDF dart-define
active_blockers.notes: Integration generator requires `--dart-define=SPRINGFIELD_PDF=...`; runs skip when missing.
active_blockers.impact: Prevents deterministic fixture refresh during strict verification loops.

recently_resolved_blockers.title: Sync data-flow bugs — pull crash + push storm + retry amplification
recently_resolved_blockers.notes: RESOLVED (Session 481): Column stripping via PRAGMA, lastSyncTime persisted to SQLite, schema errors non-transient.

recently_resolved_blockers.title: PDF extraction regression — 129 items / $357B budget
recently_resolved_blockers.notes: RESOLVED (Session 481): Upscaler reverted to uniform 600 DPI, bidAmount preserved through model chain, all 6 display sites updated.

recently_resolved_blockers.title: Supabase sync failure — triple DNS check + missing company context + duplicate callbacks
recently_resolved_blockers.notes: RESOLVED (Session 481): DNS removed from SyncService, company context wired to orchestrator, onSyncComplete fires once.

recently_resolved_blockers.title: Stale SQLite data persists across sign-out — clearLocalCompanyData never called
recently_resolved_blockers.notes: RESOLVED (Session 475): clearLocalCompanyData wired into signOut(), 4 missing tables added, loadProjectsByCompany(null) returns empty list.

recently_resolved_blockers.title: kMinCropWidth=500 causes item merger regression
recently_resolved_blockers.notes: RESOLVED (Session 473): Reverted all files, baseline 68/3/0 restored.

recently_resolved_blockers.title: New user onboarding routing trap — router sends companyId=null users to pending-approval
recently_resolved_blockers.notes: RESOLVED (Session 472+474): Fixed stale profile cache + 4 auth race conditions.

recently_resolved_blockers.title: Password reset email link cannot deliver token_hash to app
recently_resolved_blockers.impact: Resolved — OTP password reset fully functional.

resolved_blockers.title: Firebase platform config requires manual setup
resolved_blockers.notes: Session 453: Firebase project created and wired up.

resolved_blockers.title: Global flutter test suite has unrelated pre-existing failures

brainstorm_backlog.title: Cell classification validation using consolidated headers
brainstorm_backlog.description: Now that headers are consolidated early (Stage 4A.1), we have complete column names and positions available before cell extraction. Brainstorm a validation method that uses the consolidated header structure to validate/correct cell classification.
brainstorm_backlog.context: During header consolidation design (Option B selected for soft validation), user deferred validation to a future session.

dependencies_at_risk.issue: Deprecated APIs used for field mapping
Platform channel timeout issues on some devices

team_context.work_style: Orchestration-based (user defines plans, Claude executes with agents)
